caption: A football game is played in a large stadium with green grass and yellow yard lines. Players in white uniforms and players in black uniforms are positioned on the field. On-screen text displays game statistics, including "1st & 10," "3rd," and a game clock showing "1:40" and then "1:39," alongside team logos and the text "ULTIMATE TEAM." A small inset window in the lower-left corner shows a man with blond hair wearing a dark blue shirt and headphones. As the action progresses, the player in the white uniform with the ball is tackled to the ground by players in black uniforms. The man in the inset window reacts with an open-mouthed expression. By the final sequence, several players remain standing around the fallen athlete, and a green circular graphic appears on the field near the point of the tackle.
